data.body:
Goal:
Re-ground Foolery's execution-plan implementation in the Grooming to Execution Plan spec and the Knots taxonomy. This parent tracks the repair work needed after we discovered that the current `/api/plans` path still inherits legacy Scene and beat-store assumptions instead of using spec-native execution-plan concepts.

Verification:
1. `kno edge list <parent-id>` shows child knots covering taxonomy, workflow/runtime semantics, compat-status removal, plan-generation path repair, and live validation.
2. Child outcomes collectively leave `/api/plans` grounded in spec-native terminology and validated against a real Knots repo.

Constraints:
- Do not add new compatibility layers to preserve invalid abstractions.
- Prefer removing unsupported concepts over translating them.
data.title: Repair execution-plan taxonomy and spec alignment
